products.name: Gray Mesh Back Snapback with White Logo
products.description: Ready to hit the streets in style? This high-profile mesh back snapback consists of five panels with a pro stitch on the crown. The hat has an adjustable strap at the back and four embroidered eyelets.

products.name: Black Pom-Pom Beanie with White Logo
products.description: Spruce up your cold-weather collection with a custom beanie! The thick knit offers tons of warmth and comfort while the fold-over cuff showcases our embroiudere logo and gives the hat a personal flair. Finished with a pom-pom on top for a classic silhouette, this beanie is an instant crowd-favorite.

products.name: Black Visor Flexfit with White Logo
products.description: A visor is perfect for the days when you’re not in the mood for a cap, but you still want to protect your peepers from the blinding sun. Made of a quick-drying fabric, it’ll be right for sports activities or just a casual stroll around.
